nasb.text: and they could not find anything that they might do, for all the people were hanging on to every word He said.

esv.text: but they did not find anything they could do, for all the people were hanging on his words.

cnv.text: 但他們不知道要怎樣下手，因為眾人都圍著他，聽他的教訓。

ccb.text: 只是无从下手，因为百姓都十分喜爱听祂讲道。

csbs.text: 可是他们不知道怎样下手，因为民众都倾心听他。
